items.title: Freelancer
tasks: Creation of a web system based on Brazilian legislation for managing administrative processes.
Creation of a web system for managing family services in CRAS units.
Creation of a system for managing government purchases, also based on legislation.
Test development with PHPUnit and Vitest.
Creation of intuitive dashboards with Apex Charts and Charts.js.
Automated tools for CSV data import and PDF/Word data export.

Creation of an environmental license management system.
Creation of intuitive dashboards with Charts.js.
Creation of a Java Android application for ticket management.
Container orchestration and application deployment using Docker.

items.title: Educational and Scientific

Development of the scientific project MeGuia.ai, competitor in the Robotics and Automation category in Crato-CE.
